titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Theater, Dance and Performance Studies, Yale University, Records
Theater, Dance, and Performance Studies, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Michael Lotstein, Jeanne Lowrey, and Marion Hamilton

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday May 27, 2026 at 03:00

did.unittitle: Theater, Dance and Performance Studies, Yale University, records

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Theater, Dance, and Performance Studies, Yale University, records (RU 1204). University Archives, Yale University Library.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of YRG 22. Records of the Yale School of Drama.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of departmental administrative files, student records, writings, and projects.
